assessment_questions.title: What are your primary smile concerns?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Select all that apply.

assessment_questions.title: Which teeth bother you the most?
assessment_questions.subtitle: This helps us focus recommendations on specific areas.

assessment_questions.title: How quickly are you hoping to see results?
assessment_questions.subtitle: For example, before an upcoming event or within a certain number of months.

assessment_questions.title: What is your approximate budget for improving your smile?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Move the slider to the maximum amount you’re comfortable investing.

assessment_questions.title: How long are you comfortable being in treatment?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Shorter treatments may limit which options are suitable.

assessment_questions.title: How important is it that your treatment is discreet or nearly invisible?
assessment_questions.subtitle: For example, clear aligners vs. more noticeable options.

assessment_questions.title: Have you had orthodontic or cosmetic dental treatment before?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Include braces, clear aligners, veneers, or bonding.

assessment_questions.title: Do you currently experience tooth or gum sensitivity?
assessment_questions.subtitle: This can affect which whitening and cosmetic options are recommended.

assessment_questions.title: What is your top priority for treatment?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Choose the goal that matters most right now.

assessment_questions.title: How often can you visit the clinic for appointments?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Some treatments require more frequent visits than others.

assessment_questions.title: Do you prefer fewer, longer visits or more, shorter visits?
assessment_questions.subtitle: We’ll use this to match you with treatments that fit your schedule.

assessment_questions.title: Do you have an upcoming event you’re planning your new smile around?
assessment_questions.subtitle: For example, a wedding, graduation, or important trip.

assessment_questions.title: Do you have any medical conditions or take medications that affect your oral health?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Examples include diabetes, osteoporosis, or blood thinners.

assessment_questions.title: Is there anything else we should know about your smile or goals?
assessment_questions.subtitle: Share any details that haven’t been covered yet.

treatment_categories.name: Teeth Whitening
treatment_categories.description: In-office and take-home cosmetic teeth whitening treatments to brighten stained or discolored teeth.

treatment_categories.name: Veneers
treatment_categories.description: Porcelain and composite veneer options to reshape, resize, and improve the appearance of front teeth.

treatment_categories.name: Invisalign & Clear Aligners
treatment_categories.description: Clear aligner treatments such as Invisalign to straighten teeth discreetly.

treatment_categories.name: Other Cosmetic Treatments
treatment_categories.description: Additional cosmetic services such as bonding, contouring, and smile makeovers.

assessment_options.label: Old crowns, fillings, or bonding I don’t like
All teeth that show when I smile
No specific deadline (6+ months is fine)
No prior cosmetic or orthodontic treatment

treatments.name: In-Office Power Whitening
treatments.short_description: Single-visit in-office whitening to dramatically brighten your smile in about one hour.
treatments.long_description: Our In-Office Power Whitening uses a professional-strength whitening gel activated by a specialized light to brighten your teeth by several shades in a single visit. Ideal if you want fast results before an upcoming event. Includes a brief consultation, shade check, and post-treatment sensitivity recommendations.

treatments.name: Premium In-Office Whitening Plus Take-Home Trays
treatments.short_description: Enhanced in-office whitening with custom trays for at-home maintenance.
treatments.long_description: Our Premium In-Office Whitening includes a longer in-office whitening session for maximum shade change, followed by custom-fitted take-home trays and professional gel refills to maintain your result. This option is ideal for patients who want both dramatic initial whitening and easy touch-ups over the next several months.

treatments.name: Custom Take-Home Whitening Kit
treatments.short_description: Whiten at home with custom trays and professional-strength gel.
treatments.long_description: The Custom Take-Home Whitening Kit includes impressions for custom trays, a fitting appointment, and several weeks’ supply of professional-strength whitening gel. You’ll wear the trays for 20–45 minutes per day until you reach your desired shade. This option is great for gradual whitening with more control over sensitivity.

treatments.name: Whitening Maintenance Pens
treatments.short_description: Easy at-home whitening pens to maintain your brighter smile.
treatments.long_description: Whitening Maintenance Pens are a quick, on-the-go option to refresh your smile between professional whitening treatments. Simply twist, apply, and go—ideal for maintaining brightness after in-office or take-home whitening.

treatments.name: Porcelain Veneers (Per Tooth)
treatments.short_description: Premium porcelain veneers to reshape and brighten individual teeth.
treatments.long_description: Porcelain veneers are ultra-thin shells custom-crafted to bond to the front of your teeth, changing their shape, size, and color. This per-tooth option is ideal when only a few teeth need cosmetic improvement. Treatment typically requires two to three visits: consultation and planning, tooth preparation and temporaries, and final veneer placement.

treatments.name: Composite Veneers (Per Tooth)
treatments.short_description: Same-day composite veneers to quickly enhance multiple front teeth.
treatments.long_description: Composite veneers are sculpted directly on your teeth in a single visit using tooth-colored resin. They are a more affordable alternative to porcelain veneers and are ideal for improving the shape, color, and alignment of several front teeth with minimal enamel removal.

treatments.name: Porcelain Veneers Smile Zone Package (8 Teeth)
treatments.short_description: Comprehensive porcelain veneer makeover for the full visible smile zone.
treatments.long_description: The Smile Zone Package includes up to eight porcelain veneers across your upper front teeth to transform your entire smile. This package is ideal for patients seeking a dramatic change in color, alignment, and shape. Treatment includes digital smile design, temporaries, and final porcelain veneers.

treatments.name: Composite Bonding – Front Teeth
treatments.short_description: 1–2 visit bonding to repair chips, close gaps, and reshape front teeth.
treatments.long_description: Composite bonding uses tooth-colored resin carefully layered and polished on your front teeth to fix chips, close small gaps, and improve overall shape. Most cases are completed in one or two visits with little to no enamel removal, making this a conservative and highly popular cosmetic option.

treatments.name: Composite Bonding – Single Tooth
treatments.short_description: Quick bonding to repair a single chipped or misshapen tooth.
treatments.long_description: This focused bonding service is ideal if just one tooth is chipped, misshapen, or discolored. In a single visit, we match the resin to your natural tooth shade and sculpt it for a seamless result.

treatments.name: Invisalign Express (Mild Cases)
treatments.short_description: Short-term Invisalign treatment for mild crowding or spacing.
treatments.long_description: Invisalign Express is designed for mild cosmetic concerns such as small gaps or minor crowding. Treatment typically lasts 4–5 months and uses a limited series of clear aligners to gently move your front teeth into a more ideal position.

treatments.name: Invisalign Comprehensive
treatments.short_description: Full Invisalign treatment for moderate to complex alignment cases.
treatments.long_description: Invisalign Comprehensive addresses a wide range of bite and alignment concerns using a full series of clear aligners. You’ll change aligners every 1–2 weeks and visit the clinic periodically for progress checks. Most patients complete treatment in 12–18 months.

treatments.name: Invisalign Lite
treatments.short_description: Medium-length Invisalign plan for moderate cosmetic alignment.
treatments.long_description: Invisalign Lite is ideal if your needs fall between Express and Comprehensive—more than minor touch-ups, but not a complex bite correction. Treatment usually lasts 6–9 months with regular aligner changes and checkups.

treatments.name: Laser Gum Contouring
treatments.short_description: Resculpt overgrown or uneven gums for a more balanced smile.
treatments.long_description: Laser gum contouring gently reshapes excess or uneven gum tissue to reveal more of your natural teeth. This minimally invasive procedure can be completed in a single visit with a relatively quick healing period, often combined with other cosmetic treatments like veneers or bonding.

treatments.name: Comprehensive Smile Makeover Package
treatments.short_description: Customized combination of veneers, whitening, and bonding for a full smile transformation.
treatments.long_description: This comprehensive package combines multiple cosmetic treatments—such as whitening, veneers, bonding, and gum contouring—into a coordinated plan tailored to your goals. Timing and exact pricing depend on the number of teeth treated and the specific procedures chosen.

treatments.name: Internal Bleaching – Single Dark Tooth
treatments.short_description: Lighten a single tooth darkened after trauma or root canal therapy.
treatments.long_description: Internal bleaching treats discoloration that comes from inside a tooth, often after trauma or root canal treatment. Whitening material is placed inside the tooth for a short period and may require several short visits to reach the desired shade.

treatments.name: New Patient Exam, X-Rays & Standard Cleaning
treatments.short_description: Comprehensive new-patient visit including exam, necessary X-rays, and standard cleaning.
treatments.long_description: This new-patient package includes a complete dental exam, any necessary digital X-rays, and a standard preventive cleaning. It’s a great way to establish care, check your oral health, and discuss cosmetic concerns or treatment options with a dentist.

dentists.bio: Dr. Amelia Cho is a cosmetic dentist with a special focus on minimally invasive smile makeovers, including porcelain veneers, composite bonding, and professional whitening. She combines digital smile design with a conservative approach to help patients achieve natural-looking results that fit their facial features and lifestyle.

Dr. Lena Martinez focuses on aesthetic restorative dentistry, blending porcelain veneers, composite veneers, and Invisalign to create balanced smiles. She is known for her gentle chairside manner and detailed treatment planning, especially for patients new to cosmetic dentistry.

With over 15 years of experience, Dr. Michael Ross provides full-mouth cosmetic rehabilitation, including smile makeovers that combine veneers, bonding, gum contouring, and whitening. He emphasizes long-term function alongside aesthetics.

An orthodontist with a cosmetic focus, Dr. Sophia Nguyen specializes in Invisalign and clear aligner therapy for adults seeking discreet smile improvements. She frequently coordinates treatment with cosmetic dentists for combined whitening and bonding.

Dr. Emma Patel provides comprehensive general dentistry with an emphasis on preventive care and conservative cosmetic enhancements such as whitening and bonding. She enjoys helping anxious patients feel at ease during their visits.

Dr. Daniel Kim is an orthodontist who offers Invisalign, clear braces, and traditional orthodontic options. He is particularly experienced in treating adult patients who want cosmetic alignment without compromising their professional appearance.

Dr. Benjamin Lee focuses on comprehensive exams, preventive care, and restorative treatments. He works closely with the cosmetic team to ensure that patients oral health is stable before elective cosmetic procedures.

As a periodontist, Dr. Olivia Sanchez specializes in gum health and aesthetics, including laser gum contouring and grafting procedures that enhance the appearance and longevity of cosmetic dental work.
Dr. Noah Jackson is an oral surgeon providing extractions, implant placement, and surgical procedures that often support larger cosmetic and restorative treatment plans.

A pediatric dentist, Dr. Charlotte Green focuses on creating positive experiences for children and teens. She offers preventive and restorative care, as well as cosmetic bonding for minor aesthetic concerns in young patients.
Dr. Jordan Rivera combines prosthodontic training with cosmetic techniques to restore worn or damaged smiles. They frequently manage complex cases involving veneers, crowns, and implants.

An endodontist, Dr. William Chen focuses on root canal therapy and managing dental pain. He collaborates closely with cosmetic dentists when discolored or damaged teeth require both endodontic and aesthetic treatment.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Composite Bonding to Close Front Tooth Gaps
smile_gallery_cases.description: This patient disliked the small gaps between their upper front teeth but wanted a quick, conservative option. In two visits, we used shade-matched composite bonding to close the spaces and smooth the edges for a fuller, more even smile.

smile_gallery_cases.title: 1-Visit Composite Bonding for Chipped Front Teeth
smile_gallery_cases.description: After chipping two front teeth, this patient wanted a fast repair before an upcoming event. In a single visit, we rebuilt the missing edges with composite bonding and polished the surfaces for a seamless, natural look.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Lengthening Short Front Teeth with Composite Bonding
smile_gallery_cases.description: This patient felt their front teeth looked short and worn. Over two visits, we used composite bonding to lengthen and reshape the upper front teeth, creating a more balanced and youthful smile line.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Closing Black Triangles with Composite Bonding
smile_gallery_cases.description: Following orthodontic treatment, this patient was left with small dark spaces between the front teeth near the gums. In two short visits, we carefully added composite to close the black triangles while preserving a natural tooth shape.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Porcelain Veneers for a Full Smile Makeover
smile_gallery_cases.description: This patient wanted a brighter, more symmetrical smile. We placed eight porcelain veneers on the upper front teeth to correct discoloration, minor crowding, and uneven shapes while keeping a natural translucency.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Single-Visit In-Office Teeth Whitening
smile_gallery_cases.description: Concerned about staining from coffee and tea, this patient chose in-office whitening. In about 75 minutes, we brightened the overall shade several levels while monitoring sensitivity for comfort.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Invisalign for Mild Crowding and Rotation
smile_gallery_cases.description: This adult patient wanted straighter teeth without braces. Over six months of Invisalign aligners, we corrected mild crowding and rotation of the upper and lower front teeth for a more aligned smile.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Internal Bleaching for a Dark Front Tooth
smile_gallery_cases.description: A single upper front tooth had darkened after past trauma. With internal bleaching over two short visits, we lightened the tooth to blend with the surrounding teeth without needing a crown or veneer.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Laser Gum Contouring for a Gummy Smile
smile_gallery_cases.description: This patient felt their gums showed too much when smiling. In a single visit, we used laser gum contouring to gently reshape the gumline and reveal more of the natural tooth surfaces.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Single Implant to Replace a Missing Molar
smile_gallery_cases.description: After losing a lower molar, this patient wanted a fixed solution. We placed a dental implant and crown to restore chewing function and prevent shifting of neighboring teeth.

smile_gallery_cases.title: All-Ceramic Crowns for Worn Premolars
smile_gallery_cases.description: This patient had heavy wear and old fillings on the upper premolars. We restored strength and appearance with all-ceramic crowns that match the shade and translucency of the natural teeth.

smile_gallery_cases.title: Composite Repair of a Chipped Front Tooth (Teen)
smile_gallery_cases.description: A teenage patient chipped a front tooth in a sports accident. Using tooth-colored composite in one visit, we restored the original shape and smoothed the transition so the repair is virtually invisible.

offers.title: New Patient Exam, X-Rays & Cleaning – $149 March Special
offers.description: Comprehensive new-patient package including a doctor exam, all necessary digital X-rays, and a standard preventive cleaning for patients with no periodontal disease. Available at all Radiant Smiles locations through March 31, 2026.
offers.terms: New adult patients only. Cannot be combined with other new-patient offers or insurance benefits. Periodontal (deep) cleaning, additional imaging, and restorative treatment are not included. Must be scheduled and completed by March 31, 2026.

offers.title: Everyday New Patient Exam, X-Rays & Cleaning
offers.description: Year-round new-patient special for a comprehensive exam, necessary X-rays, and standard cleaning at a bundled rate.
offers.terms: New patients only. Not valid with other offers. If periodontal disease is diagnosed, cleaning may be upgraded to periodontal therapy at additional cost.

offers.title: In-Office Power Whitening – $299
offers.description: Brighten your smile by several shades in about an hour with our professional in-office power whitening treatment.
offers.terms: Valid for one standard in-office whitening session. Additional sessions or take-home products available at regular price. Not recommended for patients with untreated decay or severe sensitivity.

offers.title: Custom Take-Home Whitening Trays – $199
offers.description: Save on custom whitening trays with professional-strength gel for convenient at-home brightening.
offers.terms: Includes impressions, tray fitting, and initial supply of whitening gel. Not valid with other whitening offers. Replacement gel and trays are extra.

offers.title: Save $1,000 on Invisalign Comprehensive
offers.description: Get $1,000 off full Invisalign Comprehensive treatment when you start your case before June 30, 2026.
offers.terms: Discount applies to Invisalign Comprehensive only. Records appointment (photos, X-rays, digital scans) included. Refinements and retainers may be billed separately depending on insurance coverage.

offers.title: Invisalign Express with 0% Interest Financing
offers.description: Start Invisalign Express for mild cases and spread payments over time with 0% interest when financed through our partner.
offers.terms: Subject to credit approval. 0% interest available on terms up to 24 months when financed through approved partners. Cannot be combined with other Invisalign discounts.

offers.title: Porcelain Veneers – 4 Tooth Cosmetic Bundle
offers.description: Bundle pricing for four porcelain veneers on the upper front teeth for a focused smile enhancement.
offers.terms: Bundle applies to four veneers placed in a single case. Additional teeth are priced separately. Requires initial consultation and exam; any necessary foundational treatment is extra.

offers.title: Composite Veneers – 4 Tooth Package
offers.description: More affordable cosmetic upgrade using four composite veneers on front teeth, often completed in one visit.
offers.terms: Package pricing applies to four composite veneers on eligible front teeth. Touch-ups may be needed over time and are not included.

offers.title: Same-Day Emergency Exam & X-Ray
offers.description: Discounted same-day emergency exam and single-tooth X-ray for urgent concerns like toothaches, broken teeth, or swelling.
offers.terms: Covers problem-focused exam and one periapical X-ray. Additional X-rays, treatment, or prescriptions billed separately. Same-day availability not guaranteed but prioritized for emergencies.

offers.title: Laser Gum Contouring – Upper Front Teeth
offers.description: Save on cosmetic laser gum contouring to reduce a gummy smile across the upper front teeth.
offers.terms: Includes one gum contouring session on the upper front teeth and a follow-up visit. Not appropriate for all gum conditions; consultation required.

offers.title: Front-Teeth Composite Bonding Makeover
offers.description: Package pricing for cosmetic bonding on up to four upper front teeth to fix chips, close small gaps, and refine shape.
offers.terms: Includes bonding on up to four upper front teeth in one or two visits. Additional teeth and future touch-ups are extra.

offers.title: Whitening Maintenance Pen Bundle
offers.description: Purchase a bundle of three whitening pens to maintain your bright smile between professional treatments.
offers.terms: Includes three whitening maintenance pens. Intended for maintenance only; not a substitute for professional whitening. While supplies last.
